page.title: Employment Profiles

referenceHelp.orgUnitId: Choose the organization unit this profile belongs to.

referenceHelp.linkedUserId: Choose the user account to link to this employment profile.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by employee code, legal name, or display name

directReports.emptyMessage: This profile currently has no direct reports.

detail.externalContractHelper: Labor contracts and legal appendices are stored in the external HR process. This screen records only an operational reference status.

validation.invalidToken: Value must use supported token characters.
validation.invalidDate: Date must be a valid YYYY-MM-DD value.
validation.onboardedBeforeHired: Onboarded Date must not be before Hired Date.
validation.contractStatusTransitionNotAllowed: This contract-status transition is not allowed.

createWorkflow.pageSubtitle: Create a people record through an ordered, reviewable workflow.

sections.identityHelp: Enter the person's business identity and role information.
sections.relationshipHelp: Choose organizational placement, employment dates, and an optional login link.
sections.attributionHelp: Optionally record the people responsible for recruiting and onboarding.

review.title: Review Employment Profile
review.help: Confirm the business identity and placement before creating the record.

errors.validationSummary: Review the highlighted fields before trying again.
errors.retryableSummary: The Employment Profile could not be created. Your entries are preserved; try again.
errors.backendField: The server could not accept this field.

boundary.noAutomaticAccess: Creating an Employment Profile does not assign a Role, grant access, provision payroll, create a work schedule, or add unrelated records.

confirm.unlinkUser: Unlink user from this employment profile?

employmentTerms.title: Employment terms / salary
employmentTerms.subtitle: Structured effective-dated employment terms and payroll source eligibility.
employmentTerms.sensitivePermission: Amounts are hidden. Sensitive salary access is required to view or edit them.
employmentTerms.accessRequired: Dedicated Employment Terms permission is required. No terms or salary data was loaded.

empty.title: No employment terms / salary
empty.message: Create a draft when confirmed structured terms are available.

validation.dateRange: End date must not be before effective date.
validation.currency: Currency must be exactly three uppercase letters.
validation.allowanceCount: A maximum of 20 allowances is supported.
validation.allowanceFields: Allowance type and label are required and must stay within their limits.
validation.sourceNote: Source notes must be at most 500 characters.

errors.loadMessage: Employment terms could not be loaded.
errors.conflict: The action conflicts with maker/checker or overlapping approved terms.
